name: Overpass (OpenStreetMap)
description: Search places and points of interest on OpenStreetMap (restaurants, hotels, hiking huts, drinking water, EV charging, and 25+ more presets). Geocoding via Nominatim, POI search via Overpass API with automatic mirror fallback (overpass-api.de -> private.coffee -> kumi.systems) to handle rate limits.

credentials_optional.label: Overpass API Endpoint
credentials_optional.hint: Optional. Pin to a specific Overpass endpoint (e.g. your own self-hosted instance). By default the skill rotates through three public mirrors automatically on rate-limit or error, so this is rarely needed. If set, your endpoint is tried first, then the default mirrors are used as fallback.

tools.name: geocode_place
tools.description: Convert a place name, address, or city into latitude/longitude coordinates (via Nominatim)

tools.name: find_nearby
tools.description: Find points of interest near a location by preset category (28 categories: food, accommodation, shopping, tourism, transport, outdoor/hiking, utilities)

tools.name: search_custom
tools.description: Run a custom Overpass QL query for advanced use cases (power users)

author: freddy-schuetz
